📊 PUNTMATE NZ — FIFA World Cup 2026

🏟 France vs Spain

PICK: France
ODDS: 2.58 (Head to Head)

No pick meets my criteria today. France at 2.58 is the closest option available, but it sits well outside my preferred 1.40–2.20 range, and the available news snippets relate to rugby league — not football — providing zero usable intelligence on form, injuries or squad depth. Without credible match-specific data, I cannot justify placing capital on any outcome here. Discipline means sitting this one out.

Confidence: Low
